events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: unsealed/unlapped flashing laps fail TMS 402 and BIA Tech Note requirements for continuous, sealed flashing that directs cavity water to weeps — decision is `fail`, risk `medium` (durability/corrosion risk, not immediate life-safety), with corrective actions to stop cavity close-in, re-lap and seal joints, and re-inspect before proceeding.
